text:
There once was a squirrel who loved going camping. Especially autumn. Trees are her favorite places.

One autumn she went a-camping. She climbed trees. She collected acorns. She went fishing. She went sledding. She sat.

It snowed. Lots.

She went sledding down a slippery hill. She flew! Into an oak tree.

She woke up.

No one was home. Just snow.

She left.

She went sledding.

Oh. That wasntings.

She flew!

Into another tree.

Now there.

That tree.

Oh.

A squirrel!

It wasn't her.

That wasn't her!

Just an acorn.



There stood...

A squirrel.

With a look.

Like hers.

You're going.


I want a tree.

Just one.

With no holes.

That's impossible.

Why are you...

Oh.

You think trees are ugly?

They're big.

You're small.

Big trees aren't ugly.

They're beautiful.

You see?


That
